frame_analyses.description: Setup is observed, no instruments visible yet.
Needle is being picked up and loaded into the needle driver.
Needle is passed through the first mark on the Penrose drain.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Initial puncture appears slightly off the mark.

frame_analyses.description: Needle is passed through the second mark of the Penrose drain.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Puncture is close to the mark, minor deviation noted.

frame_analyses.description: First throw (double throw) of the knot is being placed.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Attempting a surgeon's knot with decent tension.

frame_analyses.description: Completion of first throw with tension applied.
Second throw with hand switch is being made.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Hand switch observed, following correct procedure.

frame_analyses.description: Completion of second throw with additional tension.
Third and final throw is executed with another hand switch.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Methodical and proper switching, preserving knot integrity.

frame_analyses.description: Suture ends are being cut inside the trainer.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Both ends cut close to knot.

frame_analyses.description: Final view of the completed knot, task completed.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Knot appears secure, no gap visible.

knot_assessments.notes: Final single throw, tight and secure.

drain_assessment.assessment_note: The slit is fully closed with no visible gap.

technique_summary: Overall, the task was completed with a secure knot and minimal deviation from the marks. Hand switching was executed properly between throws, leading to a solid completion.
improvement_suggestions: Minimize deviation from suture placement marks
Ensure tension is consistent during knot placement
